description.value:
Not every kasatha boarded the Idari. Some solarians believed that since their planet was to be no more, the only place kasathas truly belonged was in the vastness of space. Nomadic by nature and survivalist by necessity, these ascetics embraced the void. A new tradition emerged in which kasatha solarians trained themselves to float in vacuum while meditating on the concepts of form and emptiness. Growing up in one of these families, you're experienced in void meditation.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Breath Control] general feat. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy] while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Untethered].
